title: たまにはこんな時間も

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hm... This method would certainly allow them to
train more efficiently without adding physical
strain.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Going back to my earlier proposal, is there
anything you'd like to—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, I was just thinking about how our
relationship has changed since we first met.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I never would've imagined we'd reach a point
where we could exchange opinions like this...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I suppose a lot has happened since then.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The approach you take with your racer has
reminded me of something important.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know you're not perfect, and there's plenty I
would contend with you...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But what I'm about to say is genuinely how I feel,
Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful to you. And I mean that from the
bottom of my heart.
choice_data_list: I'm the one who should be thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Then I suppose we feel the same way about each
other.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We still have a long way to go before we can
relax, but for now, why don't we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We can invite <chrname>, Little
Cocon, and Bitter Glasse out for dinner after this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
They're not the most social butterflies out there,
but I'm sure they'd be excited for a buffet.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Of course, there's no need to force them. If they
decline, well...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It would still be nice for us adults to enjoy a
relaxed meal together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone quickly agrees to come, and we spend a
fun-filled night together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone quickly agrees to come, and we spend a
fun-filled night together.
